Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Interrogatory Answers And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-24-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:

Daniel W. Hager, for Defendant and Moving Party William Weisberg

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant William Weisberg's motion to compel further responses to special interrogatories is granted. The objections are overruled and stricken. Plaintiff is ordered to provide supplemental verified responses within 21 days of notice of this order. The Court finds that plaintiff asserted unmeritorious objections and made evasive responses. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $640 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. Order signed. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
